title: Toolbox
abstract: A toolbox is provided, wherein the toolbox includes: an upper wall; a bottom wall; two first side walls; a second side wall arranged between the upper wall and the bottom wall and transverse to and between the two first side walls; fastening assemblies each including a bolt and a nut; at least one storage drawer; wherein the fastening assemblies respectively clamp and secure the upper wall and each of the first side walls and clamp and secure the bottom wall and each of the first side walls, the upper wall, the bottom wall, the two first side walls and the second side wall define an accommodation space and an insertion opening and in communication with the accommodation space, and the at least one storage drawer is withdrawably inserted in the accommodation space via the insertion opening.
claims: 1. A toolbox including: an upper wall; a bottom wall arranged opposite to the upper wall; two first side walls arranged transverse to and between the upper wall and the bottom wall and facing each other; a second side wall arranged between the upper wall and the bottom wall and transverse to and between the two first side walls; a plurality of first fastening assemblies each including a first bolt and a first nut; a plurality of second fastening assemblies each including a second bolt and a second nut; at least one storage drawer; wherein one of the upper wall and each of the two first side walls includes a plurality of first through holes, and the other of the upper wall and each of the two first side walls includes a plurality of first receiving holes respectively corresponding to the plurality of first through holes; wherein one of the bottom wall and each of the two first side walls includes a plurality of second through holes, and the other of the bottom wall and each of the two first side walls includes a plurality of second receiving holes respectively corresponding to the plurality of second through holes; wherein each of the plurality of first receiving holes receives one said first nut, each said first bolt is blockably inserted in one said first through hole, extends in one said first receiving hole and is screwed to one said first nut, and the first bolt and the first nut of each of the plurality of first fastening assemblies respectively clamp and secure the upper wall and each of the two first side walls; wherein each of the plurality of second receiving holes receives one said second nut, each said second bolt is blockably inserted in one said second through hole, extends in one said second receiving hole and is screwed to one said second nut, and the second bolt and the second nut of each of the plurality of second fastening assemblies respectively clamp and secure the bottom wall and each of the two first side walls; wherein the upper wall, the bottom wall, the two first side walls and the second side wall define an accommodation space, and an insertion opening opposite to the second side wall and in communication with the accommodation space, and the at least one storage drawer is withdrawably inserted in the accommodation space via the insertion opening.
